title: University of Alberta president hopes for research exemptions under Bill 18
author: Kashmala Fida Mohatarem
notes: Secondary source for EVT-070. U of A president Bill Flanagan (not political scientist Tom Flanagan) advocates for post-secondary research exemptions from Bill 18. Flanagan states adding universities to the bill increases red tape and may drive top academics out of the province. Advanced Education Minister Sawhney noted as open to exemptions for Tri-Council funding. Title and notes corrected: earlier record misidentified as Tom Flanagan commentary. Date corrected from 2024-04-01 (CSV error) to 2024-05-07.
